source.exportTool: Google Chrome headless screenshot + sips crop

references.notes: Canonical Claude Host Today reference. The 2026-07-10 full-shell capture renders the production HostAppShell and deterministic Bandra Social fixture. A truthful Today pass added a minute-refreshing countdown, event-identified cross-event waitlist work routed to the exact event Guests section, lifecycle-aware live run-of-show routing, and real later-event rows while removing the unconditional setup task, synthetic review count, and fake attendee stack. The comparison improved from 29.22% / 38.22 to mismatch 28.48%, meanDelta 37.31, maxDelta 243, masked 127864. It remains above the canonical threshold because pending approvals, waitlist offers, drafts, and guest-inquiry task sources are not yet composed. HOST-V2-TODAY-FUNCTIONAL-PARITY-001 records that functional remainder; the tightened regression ceiling prevents backsliding without claiming parity.
